attackSurface.notes: Function recv_internal may be an attack surface

exploits.title: Unchecked Withdrawal — No Balance Validation
exploits.prerequisites: Attacker can call withdraw with an amount larger than the stored balance
steps: Attacker calls withdraw with amount > current balance
Contract sends the requested amount without checking sufficiency
Contract balance underflows or TON runtime covers with borrowed gas
exploits.expectedImpact: Contract over-spends, leading to unexpected balance state or runtime error

response.summary: Hacker Mode analysis identified 1 attack surface(s). 1 plausible exploit found, 0 theoretical exploits identified. Hacker Resilience Score: 80/100.

recommendations.mitigation: Review the exploit steps and add appropriate validation checks and access controls.
